{{External|rs=Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest}}
{{Has quick guide}}
{{Otheruses|def=no|the main quest guide|Recipe for Disaster}}
{{Infobox Quest
|name = Another Cook's Quest
|number = 100.1
|image = [[File:Recipe for Disaster.png|300px]]
|release = [[15 March]] [[2006]]
|update = Hundredth Quest - Recipe for Disaster!
|members = Yes
|series = None
|developer = James B (framework)
}}
== Details ==
<onlyinclude> <!-- <onlyinclude> and <includeonly> are being used to support formatting on the main Recipe for Disaster page. Please do not remove -->
<includeonly>
==Another Cook's Quest==
===Details===
</includeonly>
{{Quest details
|start = The [[Cook (Lumbridge)|Cook]] in [[Lumbridge Castle]]'s kitchen.
|difficulty = Special
|description = The cook in Lumbridge has a surprisingly small number of ingredients to hand in his kitchen, possibly as a result of an endless stream of newcomers with light fingers taking anything that isn't nailed down from his kitchen.

Luckily, in the past a kind [[Cook's Assistant]] was willing to help him in his culinary duties, but now a problem has appeared that could spell... a Recipe For Disaster!

Almost all members may attempt to solve his tricky predicament, and be rewarded accordingly, but only the very elite of Questers will be able to put an end to his problem permanently!
|length = Short
|requirements = *{{SCP|Cooking|10|link=yes}} {{Boostable|No}} {{Questreqstart|}}
*Completion of [[Cook's Assistant]]
|items = *[[Eye of newt]]
*[[Greenman's ale]]
*[[Rotten tomato]]
*Any [[fruit blast]] excluding a [[premade fr' blast]]
*[[Ashes]]
|leagueRegion = <poem>
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Kandarin}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the quest
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Morytania}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the quest
</poem>
}}

===Walkthrough===
----
[[File:Cook (Lumbridge) chathead.png|left]]
{{Needed|An [[eye of newt]], a [[greenman's ale]], a [[rotten tomato]], [[ashes]], and a [[fruit blast]] (or 8 gold and a [[knife]])}}

The [[Cook (Lumbridge)|Cook]] tells you that he needs a [[Eye of newt|newt's eye]], a [[Greenman's ale]], a [[rotten tomato]], and a [[dirty blast]] in order to prepare for the centennial feast. If you ask him how to make a dirty blast, he will tell you to add [[ashes]] to a [[fruit blast]]. He will give you {{NoCoins|100}} [[coins]] to buy everything, and he will allow you to keep the change.

====Gathering the ingredients====
* An [[eye of newt]] can be bought from [[Herblore shops]] or [[Betty's Magic Emporium.|Betty's Magic Emporium]] in [[Port Sarim]].
* [[Greenman's ale]] is sold in [[Yanille]] at the [[Dragon Inn]] bar for {{NoCoins|10}} coins.
* A [[rotten tomato]] can be bought from a [[Pelters' Veg Stall]] near [[pillory]] cages in [[Varrock]], [[Seers' Village]], [[Yanille]], and [[Hosidius]] or [[Shop of Distaste]] at the [[Emir's Arena]] for {{NoCoins|1}} coin.
* A [[fruit blast]] can be bought from the [[Grand Exchange]] or chosen as a reward when handing in Digsite exam certificates to [[Curator Haig Halen]] in [[Varrock]] after completion of [[The Dig Site]]. All of the ingredients required to make one can be obtained in the [[Gnome Stronghold]] from [[Hudo]].
** '''{{Colour|red|Warning:}}''' A [[premade fr' blast]] will '''not''' work. 
** Burn a fire for [[ashes]] or kill an [[elemental wizard]], then add them to the [[fruit blast]] for a [[dirty blast]].

;Creating a [[fruit blast]] from scratch
#Go to [[Grand Tree Groceries]] (north-west corner of the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}} of the [[Grand Tree]]) and pick up the [[cocktail shaker]] spawn on the table. Buy 2 [[lemon]]s, 1 [[pineapple]], and 1 [[orange]] from [[Hudo]]. 
#Run over to where [[Heckel Funch]] is (in the south-east corner) to find a [[Cocktail glass]] spawn.
#Mix the [[cocktail shaker]] and select "Fruit Blast."
#Use a [[knife]] to [[Lemon slices|slice]] (not [[Lemon chunks|dice]]) the remaining [[lemon]], then pour your [[cocktail shaker]] to create a [[fruit blast]].
#Finally, use the ashes on the [[fruit blast]] to make the [[dirty blast]].

Once you have all 4 items, give them to the Cook. Enter the dining room to open up the rest of [[Recipe for Disaster]].

'''Congratulations, quest complete!''' (''for now...'')

===Rewards===
----
{{Quest rewards
|name = Recipe for Disaster/Another Cook's Quest
|image = [[File:Another Cook's Quest reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 1
|rewards =
*The invitation to the feast of a lifetime!
*Access to the [[Culinaromancer's Chest]] (after watching the cut scene in the feast room).
}}</onlyinclude>

==Transcript==
{{hastranscript|quest}}

{{Another Cook's Quest}}
{{Recipe for Disaster}}
